result.reason: RDP sessions fail after multiple connections due to unreleased COM objects. Explicitly disposing ProtocolBase instances will ensure proper resource cleanup.
result.approach: Add a call to `prot.Dispose()` in `ConnectionInitiator.Prot_Event_Closed` to ensure COM objects are released when a connection closes.
